environment_type: Primary setting for discovery and initial character establishment.
visual_summary: A vast, desolate landscape of rugged Arizona hills and mountains characterized by sun-bleached granite and exposed geological formations. The central visual anchor is a massive, prominent gold-bearing quartz vein embedded directly into the rocky hillside.
layout_notes: Remote prospecting site within arid, rocky desert terrain; features large mountain vistas.
lighting: Harsh, high-desert sunlight with intense heat shimmer over the rocks.
constraints: Must maintain a dry, dusty atmosphere.
Visual focus must remain on the singular glittering quartz vein.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific dimensions or exact location of the gold vein within the hills are not defined.
evidence_summary: Environment currently kept under extracted canonical id.
Role: Primary setting for discovery and initial character establishment.

Geography: Rugged, remote Arizona hills and mountains; characterized by rocky terrain and exposed geological formations. Features a massive, prominent gold-bearing quartz vein embedded in the hillside.
Lighting: Harsh, high-desert sunlight; dry, dusty atmosphere with intense heat shimmer over the rocks.
Atmosphere: Harsh, high-desert sunlight; dry, dusty atmosphere with intense heat shimmer over the rocks.
Scale: Vast, desolate mountain vistas; the singular, glittering quartz vein serves as the central visual anchor.
Prompt Phrases: rugged desert mountains, exposed quartz vein, gold-bearing rock, arid Arizona hills, sun-bleached granite, remote prospecting site.
